title: Acidjazzed Evening [4-N163]
description:
Done (with Famitracker) within four N163 channels and the standard 2A03 noise channel. I heavily relied on Tempest's original .mod to make this, so naturally, I tried to make it sound as much like the original as possible within the scope of the expansion chip. Other than the fact that I sucked at the percussion, I think it sounds pretty okay. I'll comfort myself with the fact that I still did more work than Timbaland did!

Original song by Janne Suni, visuals are MIDITrail.
